name: The Perfect Strike of the Phoenix (Secret)

system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Bladed Melee (No roll required)
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

You leap at your foe in a whirl of meandering strikes that no one can block or dodge. This Technique is so profound and perfect that it requires no Attack roll. It also cannot be parried by any counter except for the Perfect Block of the Raksha. To attack a foe, simply roll normal Damage with your weapon. This is an ancient Technique long since forgotten and lost after the destruction of the Jade Phoenix sect. According to legend, the details of this Technique are still contained in the ruins of the Jade Phoenix Temple (but no one knows its whereabouts). Cathartic: In addition to the above effects, you may use this to strike multiple foes (1 per Rank of Waijia) and you may add 3 Extra Wounds per Attack. Even though no Attack roll is required, for the purpose of determining Imbalance Points gained, treat as a normal success.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
